_doc: Whalesborough Stripe webhook subscription matrix. Configure these events on the production and staging endpoints. Each event lists its handler responsibilities, expected processing time SLO, downstream side-effects, and idempotency key shape. Created: 2026-05-14.

responsibilities: Look up payments row by metadata.booking_id OR metadata.order_id
Mark payments row PAID with stripe_charge_id and balance_transaction_id
If revenue_stream=stay -> confirm booking, write to bookings_confirmed, trigger Resend booking-confirmation email
If revenue_stream=spa -> confirm slot in spa_bookings, trigger spa-confirmation email + add to therapist roster
If revenue_stream=dine -> confirm event ticket OR group deposit; if event, generate QR-code ticket via Resend
If revenue_stream=shop -> create order in orders table with status='paid', enqueue picking task
If revenue_stream=membership -> entitle facility access (see invoice.payment_succeeded for renewals)
If revenue_stream=lodge_sale -> notify owner-experience team via Slack, mark reservation_agreement signed pending solicitor
If revenue_stream=gift_card -> mint code via gift-card service, schedule recipient email at send_at
Accrue Acorns to circle_accounts only on fulfilment-confirmation event, NOT here (fraud guard per loyalty-spec)
events.idempotency: event.id stored in webhook_events with unique constraint

responsibilities: Mark payments row FAILED with last_payment_error JSON
Release inventory holds (SAGA rollback)
If unit was held for accommodation, release the date-range hold
If spa slot was held, release
Email guest with friendly retry CTA + restored cart link
If Klarna decline, suppress Klarna option for this customer for 24h via redis cache key 'klarna:suppress:{customer_id}'
If 3DS challenge failed, increment failed_3ds_counter; at 3 fails block customer for 1h
Emit metric payment.failed{reason, revenue_stream} for Plausible/Grafana
SAGA hook: verify all line-item reservations are still valid in DB
If valid -> call stripe.paymentIntents.capture
If any reservation expired -> call stripe.paymentIntents.cancel, then refund any pre-captured amounts, email guest apology + 5% next-time voucher
Mark payments row CANCELED
Release all associated holds in DB
If guest initiated, send confirmation email; if system-initiated, suppress email
Update payments row with refund_amount, refund_reason, refunded_at
If partial refund, flag partial_refund=true
Reverse Acorns earned on the refunded portion (pro-rated for partial)
Email guest refund confirmation + bank statement explanation
If add-on retail goods involved, mark order_lines as refunded
Update Xero ledger via reconciliation cron (not real-time)
Insert dispute row in disputes table
Alert duty manager via Slack #finance immediately
If guest is currently on-property, alert front-of-house manager via app push
Auto-attach evidence package to Stripe dispute: 3DS authentication record JSON, signed booking confirmation PDF, in-stay activity logs, communication log
Set customers.metadata.risk_review_required=true
Suppress future scheduled fulfilment (subscription renewals, scheduled gift card sends) for the customer pending resolution
Engineering Sentry warning if dispute rate exceeds 0.5% of last 30 days transactions
Update dispute row with outcome (won/lost) and stripe-side fee/loss amount
If won, restore customer risk_review_required=false
If lost, retain risk flag, debit P&L 'disputes lost' in Xero
Notify finance via email summary
Insert w_club_memberships or lakeside_locals_memberships row
Set minimum_term_ends = start + 3 months (W Club)
Send welcome email with member ID + Wallet pass link
Issue Apple/Google Wallet pass via PassKit service
Update circle_accounts: upgrade tier if applicable (Wellness -> min Friend, Signature -> min Member per loyalty-spec §6)
Add to Klaviyo segment 'w_club_active'
Detect tier change (upgrade/downgrade): compare prior items array to new
On upgrade: entitle new tier features immediately, email confirmation
On downgrade scheduled: leave entitlements until current_period_end
Detect pause vs resume: pause_collection.behavior present/absent
On pause: gate facility access via app, start freeze fee billing
On resume: restore access, stop freeze fee billing
Detect cancel_at: scheduled cancellation, send retention offer email
Detect default_payment_method change: confirmation email
Mark membership row status='cancelled', cancelled_at=now
Revoke facility entitlements at current_period_end (if not already)
Do NOT remove Acorn balance (separate from membership)
Send farewell email with reactivation CTA (60-day window with 50% off rejoining fee)
Update circle_accounts: do not downgrade tier (12-month rolling holds)
Remove from Klaviyo 'w_club_active' segment, add to 'w_club_lapsed' segment
Update membership row: status='paused', pause_until from pause_collection.resumes_at
Gate facility entitlements
Start freeze maintenance fee billing (separate invoice items per paused month)
Send pause confirmation email
Update membership row: status='active', clear pause_until
Restore entitlements
Stop freeze fee billing
Send welcome-back email
Send 3-day-warning email with cancel-or-keep CTA
Useful for any future trial use; not used at v1 launch
Mark invoice row PAID
If subscription renewal, extend current_period_end, increment cycles_completed
Accrue Acorns on the renewal payment (recurring revenue earns at 1x base rate)
Send receipt email
If first invoice with joining fee, separate the joining_fee line in receipt copy
Insert dunning event in dunning_log
Smart Retries auto-handled by Stripe (day 1, 3, 7)
On each fail, send escalating email + SMS to member
After final fail (status -> unpaid), 7-day grace then revoke entitlements
Slack alert to retention team for any high-tier (Signature, Founder) failure
Send renewal reminder email 7 days before billing
Show upcoming amount and any usage/add-on changes
For annual W Club, email 30 days + 7 days + 1 day
Used only for gift-card recipient flow where receiver redeems via Checkout
Confirm gift_cards row redemption activity, decrement balance
Email recipient with booking link
events.note: Main checkout uses Payment Element + manual PaymentIntent flow, not Checkout. This event handles only the gift-card-redemption Checkout sub-flow.

responsibilities: Save payment_method id to saved_payment_methods table
Update Stripe Customer with default_payment_method if first saved
Email confirmation 'Card ending **** saved to your account'
Useful for one-tap rebook and W Club auto-renewal
Flag customer for manual review by finance manager
Suppress any future scheduled fulfilment (gift card sends, hamper dispatches) for this customer
Pause any active subscription via pause_collection
If charge has not yet shipped (retail), cancel order and refund proactively to avoid chargeback
Slack alert to #finance + email finance manager
Slack alert to #finance
Email finance manager
Investigate cause via Stripe dashboard
Typically bank rejection or account closure — manual escalation

non_subscribed_events_explicitly_documen.reason: Not needed — payout schedule handles cash automation
Not needed — we manage Customer creation server-side and propagate changes directly to Stripe via customers.update; the reverse direction is not used
Not needed — products and prices are managed via bootstrap script, not edited in dashboard ad-hoc
Not used — we don't issue Stripe-issued cards
Not used — UK doesn't offer Treasury at this scale yet
Future v2 if Stripe Terminal adopted for in-resort POS — not v1
